company.name: Lupin Limited
company.subtitle: Indian respiratory + complex generics. FY25 (Mar25) revenue INR 227B / ~$2.7B. India branded 37% (~$1.0B; Cidmus sacubitril/valsartan flagship), US generics+specialty 36% (~$0.98B; gAlbuterol, gSpiriva flagship inhaled), EMEA 9%, Growth Markets 7%, API 6%. Net cash $220M. Inhalation respiratory pipeline = strategic franchise. Biosimilars: Nepexto etanercept EU, ranibizumab in development.

assets.name: gAlbuterol HFA (ProAir HFA generic) - SABA bronchodilator inhaler
assets.stage: Commercial (FY25 ~$200M+ run-rate; market-leading US generic share)

company_slice_sources.us.priceK: gAlbuterol HFA generic ~$50/mo blended (~$1500/yr full Rx incl. multiple inhalers)
company_slice_sources.us.reachPct: Lupin ~30%+ US gAlbuterol HFA volume share (severe asthma proxy uses broader denominator)

assets.name: Lupin India branded formulations franchise (Cidmus + Ondero + cardio + respi + women's)
assets.stage: Commercial (FY25 ~$1.0B India branded Rx; Cidmus INR 700+ Cr flagship)

assets.name: Lupin EMEA franchise (Europe + MENA)
assets.stage: Commercial (FY25 ~$250M EMEA + Nepexto etanercept biosim EU)

assets.name: Lupin Growth Markets franchise (APAC + LATAM + AU)
Lupin gAdvair Diskus (fluticasone-salmeterol DPI complex generic)
assets.stage: FDA review (high-value complex inhaler approval pending)

company_slice_sources.us.reachPct: Lupin gAdvair Diskus ~15-20% Advair-class share if approved
